short_summary:
Patrick Edward Fallon (born December 19, 1967) is an American businessman and politician. A member of the Republican Party, he has been the U.S. representative for Texas's 4th congressional district since 2021. Fallon was also a member of the Texas House of Representatives for the 106th district from 2013 to 2019 and represented the  30th district of the Texas Senate from 2019 to 2021.
Fallon is a member of the new House Department of Government Efficiency Committee.
